name: Three-Quarter Lookbook Walk
commercial_use: Seasonal lookbook, collection page, product storytelling
visual_goal: Show fit, drape, and movement while keeping the outfit commercially clear.
composition: Three-quarter full-body frame with the model walking into the camera line.
model_direction: Walk naturally with one foot crossing slightly forward, arms relaxed, gaze just past camera.
styling_notes: Use footwear and accessories that support the outfit without stealing attention.
lighting: Soft directional light with gentle contrast to define fabric texture.
camera_language: 70mm lens look, slight background compression, fast shutter feel with natural movement.
prompt: Professional fashion lookbook photograph of a model walking in a three-quarter full-body view, outfit moving naturally, refined styling, clean background, soft directional lighting, elegant commercial mood, clear garment shape and fabric drape.
negative_prompt: awkward walking pose, blurred face, tangled clothing, exaggerated motion blur, warped legs, noisy image
